overall.description: A slow aerial drift over a cyberpunk rooftop helipad at night, featuring neon-lit walkways, palm tree silhouettes, and futuristic architecture. The scene is rendered in a game engine with cinematic teal and purple neon lighting, creating a moody atmospheric perspective of a high-tech urban environment.

scene_state.functional_zone: rooftop helipad with neon-lit access ramp

agents.ego_description: slowly piloting a camera drone over the rooftop helipad, maintaining a steady aerial view of the neon-lit surroundings

entered.detail: circular helipad with illuminated H symbol in the foreground
curved walkway with glowing blue and purple neon edge lighting leading upward
silhouetted palm trees against the night sky in the background
tall futuristic building with illuminated windows visible in the distance
futuristic car parked near the helipad edge with reflective surfaces

segments.scene_description: The camera drifts slowly over a cyberpunk rooftop helipad marked with a glowing H symbol. A neon-lit ramp curves through the center of the frame toward palm tree silhouettes in the background, while a luxury vehicle sits parked to the left. The scene is bathed in cool teal and purple artificial lighting from the surrounding futuristic architecture.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a slow aerial drift across a high-tech rooftop that emphasizes the moody, neon-drenched atmosphere of a cyberpunk city. It begins by gliding over a helipad marked with a glowing H symbol, where the cool teal and purple artificial lighting casts deep shadows across the surface. As the camera moves forward, the view expands to reveal a luxury vehicle parked to the left and a neon-lit ramp that curves gracefully through the center of the frame. The movement finally carries the perspective toward the horizon, where the sharp silhouettes of palm trees stand against the backdrop of towering futuristic architecture.
